# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionZoneChangedEventHandler delegate

Emitted when the air-absorption zone changes (min/max thresholds crossed).

```csharp
public delegate void AirAbsorptionZoneChangedEventHandler(float cutoffHz);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| cutoffHz | Only frequencies below this value can pass through to the listener. |
